signal_conflict.finding: 23 signals fired during conflict. Win rate on conflicts: 4.3% — BELOW AVERAGE. Root cause: conflict_winner_discount is insufficient; weak dominant signals still fire instead of abstaining.

timing_errors.finding: 131 misses on moves < 3%. Root cause: monthly signal window is too coarse — small reversals within the month tip the actual direction against the signal. A trailing stop / early-exit rule would convert these to neutral rather than wrong.

market_regime.finding: 183 misses in trending/volatile regimes. Top affected months: ['January 2026', 'August 2025', 'May 2025']. Root cause: CWAF has no regime detection layer — bullish signals fire in high-volatility / downtrend regimes because ADX and VIX context are ignored.

indicator_lag.finding: 72 misses where tech score was bullish (>60) but price fell. Root cause: momentum indicators (EMA, MACD) lag by 10–20 days on monthly bars. The tech agent fires on prior-month momentum when the trend has already reversed.

fundamental_misalignment.finding: 0 misses where fundamentals were bearish (<45) but orchestrator still fired bullish. Root cause: tech_only weight (0.85 tech / 0.15 fund) overpowers fundamental bearish signals — the fund agent's warning is diluted to irrelevance.
